# Example Concept

A synthetic concept created as a fixture for the karpathy-wiki conformance test suite.

## Summary

This concept demonstrates the required OKF v0.1 frontmatter structure and Markdown
link conventions. It contains no real knowledge content.

## Details

- Source material: [sample-source.md](../../raw/sample-source.md)
- Created from: synthetic fixture

## Notes

Standard Markdown links are used throughout. No wikilinks appear in this file.
